synced:
[ti:Vivarium]
[ar:Ado]
[by:SpotiFlac]

[00:12.68]Are kara dore kurai tatta koto darou
[00:17.59]Kugomotta mono ii wa ai mo kawarazu de
[00:22.58]Kagami ga utsusu wa hedataru risouzou
[00:27.48]Bukiyou na yubisaki ni kyou mo te wo kaketa
[00:41.18]Dareka no kotoba de hitori, tsumahajiki
[00:45.97]Shouganai ne nozomareta koto nante nai shi
[00:50.87]Kobiritsuku akairo basei no ura de mondou
[00:55.80]Kekkan wa tokubetsu?
[00:57.95]Nara, hajime kara magaimono
[01:00.88]Kanaetai mono to wa hikikae ni
[01:03.33]Taisetsu na mono wo kowashite kite
[01:05.82]Koukai bakari de iki ga dekinai kara
[01:08.18]Kanjou wo sutete raku ni natte
[01:10.75]Koronda ato no kizu no naoshikata mo
[01:13.21]Nokoshita ayamachi no kui mo shiranai mama
[01:16.39]Otona ni naru no?
[01:21.61]Honogurai hakoniwa de
[01:26.56]Tomedonaku watashi ga watashi no yume wo miteita
[01:31.47]Tooku de yureta hikari wa watashi wo yobu ki ga shita
[01:44.94]Kizukeba furimuku to koko ni hitori
[01:49.89]Chirakatta heya no naka mayoikomu shinkirou
[01:54.90]Doushite afuredasu namida to shousou
[01:59.77]Fukazume no yubisaki mata akaku somatta
[02:05.26]Atama no naka de kikoeru watashi to watashi de nai koe ga
[02:07.92]Kurikaeshi kurikaeshi
[02:09.33]Umarete kita koto wo hitei suru
[02:10.96]Doushite nani mo dekinai no
[02:12.22]Doushite nani mo shiranai no
[02:13.40]Wakaranai
[02:14.03]Wakaranai
[02:14.59]Watashi ni wa wakaranai
[02:15.32]Tadashii koto hitotsu mo shiranai mama
[02:17.43]Otona ni natte shimatta mitai da
[02:20.94]Kimi wa nani mo shinji nakatta
[02:22.63]Dare mo shinjirarenakatta
[02:24.03]Kimi ni hitsuyou datta no wa meisei yori mo saki ni
[02:26.48]Daijoubu no hitokoto datta ne
[02:28.18]Ibasho wo nakushichatte gomen ne
[02:29.96]Dakara mou dete konakutatte ii sa
[02:32.17]Yureru miyako no oku
[02:33.49]Sono hikari no naka de kikai shoujo no uta ga kikoeta
[02:36.57]Watashi mo, soko ni ikitai
[02:48.27]Honogurai hakoniwa de
[02:53.27]Tomedonaku watashi ga watashi no yume wo mite ite
[02:58.19]Furerareru kyori no mama hanarenaide kawaranaide
[03:09.03]Kono hakoniwa de
[03:13.06]Dore dake mayotte sugatte mienaku natte mo
[03:17.98]Kono me de yureta hikari wa ano hi egaku mirai da
[03:27.75]Sayonara mada watashi wa
[03:35.14]Utawanakucha, ahh
[03:49.87]Yoru ga akeru made hitori janai kara
[03:56.08]Kuroozetto no kimi wa mada
[03:59.82]Naiteru
[04:03.03]
